task_description: Replace better-sqlite3 (native C++ addon incompatible with Vercel serverless) with an in-memory JavaScript store. This is a data layer swap for an MVP that only tracks today's data. All existing API routes, server actions, components, and page rendering must continue to work.

verification.summary: npm run build succeeds with all routes correctly generated. npm run lint passes with no errors. No references to better-sqlite3 remain. No test framework is configured so test_quality is skipped. No Dockerfile present.
